request.description: Partially update a bundle. All fields are optional. Providing service_ids replaces all linked services.

response.name: 200 OK - Updated Bundle

request.description: Delete a bundle permanently. Returns 204 No Content.
Download all services + bundles as a PDF file. Use 'Send and Download' button in Postman to save the file. All query params are optional — omit them to export everything.
Download all services + bundles as an Excel (.xlsx) file. Use 'Send and Download' in Postman. All query params are optional.
Download all services + bundles as a CSV file. Use 'Send and Download' in Postman. All query params are optional.

response.name: 200 OK - CSV File

request.description: Returns full aggregated profile including location, opening hours, images, amenities, highlights, values.
MUST be called first. Creates or updates display name, phone, email.
Multiple slots per day = split shift. Only days provided are updated.
Marks existing image as cover. Auto-unsets previous cover.
Provide all image IDs in desired display order (index 0 = first).

Valid amenities: parking_available, near_public_transport, showers, lockers, bath_towels, swimming_pool, sauna
Valid highlights: pet_friendly, adults_only, kid_friendly, wheelchair_accessible
Valid values: organic_products_only, vegan_products_only, environmentally_friendly, lgbtq_plus, black_owned, woman_owned, asian_owned, hispanic_owned, indigenous_owned
Partial update - only amenities replaced. Highlights and values unchanged.
Makes the profile publicly visible on the marketplace.
